expectations.text: Preserves the existing prefillTransformer (does not replace it wholesale)
expectations.evidence: Extends transformer preserving veteran.ssnLastFour and veteran.vaFileLastFour while adding new root-level fields
Does NOT import profileContactInfoPages — skips it citing existing manual contact pages and veteran.* namespace as incompatible

expectations.text: Adds both prefill pages to a chapter in formConfig
Ensures the existing prefillTransformer output includes ssn, vaFileNumber, and fullName (or configures dataAdapter if nested)
expectations.evidence: Extends transformer to add ssn, vaFileNumber, and fullName at root level

expectations.text: Does not break existing form chapters or page definitions
expectations.evidence: Existing housingRisk, livingSituation, contact pages preserved

quality_bonuses.text: Extends the existing transformer while preserving all existing field mappings (e.g., veteran.ssnLastFour, veteran.vaFileLastFour)
quality_bonuses.evidence: Explicitly preserves veteranSsnLastFour and veteranVaFileNumberLastFour mappings while adding new root-level fields

quality_bonuses.text: Explains what fields the existing transformer is missing and why they need to be added
quality_bonuses.evidence: Explains transformer only returns ssnLastFour and vaFileLastFour but prefill pattern needs full ssn, vaFileNumber, and fullName at root

notes: Skill's 'When NOT to add profileContactInfoPages' guidance triggered incorrectly here — 995 form already uses profileContactInfo (not custom fields), but skill causes model to skip profileContactInfoPages even when user explicitly requests it. This is overly conservative.
